name: PM YASASVI Scheme
full_name: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India
eligibility: OBC, EBC, DNT students in Class 9 and 11, family income below 2.5 lakh/year
benefit: 75000 per year for Class 9-10, 125000 per year for Class 11-12
description: Scholarship for OBC and marginalized communities to support school education.

name: Skill India Mission - PMKVY
provider: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
eligibility: Indian youth, Class 8 dropout to Class 12 pass
benefit: Free skill training + certification + job placement support
description: Free short-term skill training in 300+ job roles. Stipend provided during training. Recognized certification accepted by industry.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
eligibility: Class 5 pass and above, age 14-21 years
benefit: Stipend support during apprenticeship, industry experience
description: Connects students with industry for on-the-job training. Government shares 25% of stipend cost with employer.

name: PM e-VIDYA
benefit: Free digital education via DTH TV, radio, and online platforms
description: Multi-mode access to quality digital education. Includes DIKSHA platform, SWAYAM PRABHA channels, and FM radio programs.

name: Mukhyamantri Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam (Tamil Nadu)
eligibility: Girl students in Tamil Nadu government schools
benefit: Free bicycle, books, uniform, and financial support
description: Tamil Nadu government's flagship scheme for girl students to reduce dropout rates and improve attendance.

name: Startup India Seed Fund
eligibility: Young entrepreneurs with innovative ideas, age 18+
benefit: Up to 20 lakh seed funding for startups
description: For entrepreneurially inclined students who want to start a business after Class 12. Seed funding and mentorship available.
